questions: How many bytes of headroom remain and what prose is safely movable?
Which tests lock which tokens (the constraint set)?
Is the 30 KB aspiration achievable without spine restructuring?

findings.summary: guardrail inventory: corpus-consolidation spine locks + tag-timing + seal-flow + capability declarations + Phase 176 staging/budget + reference resolution
~2-3 KB rationale per skill movable into already-cited references
30 KB aspiration deferred: failure mode removed by >=2 KB headroom; spine restructuring risk not justified; new 39 KB invariant test locks the outcome
